name: J1939TestStmCreate_Toggle
title: J1939TestStmCreate_Toggle
syntax: long J1939TestStmCreate_Toggle( pg aPg, dbSignal aSignal, dword cycleTime, float value1, float value2 );
description: Creates a Toggle Stimulus. The Stimulus toggles the signal between the two given values.

parameters.name: aPg
parameters.description: This parameter group is used for sending. If no sender or receiver is specified, the addresses from this PG is used. The signal of the PG can be modified during active Stimulus.

parameters.name: aSignal
parameters.description: The Stimulus works on this signal of the parameter group.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
